name: econ housing cycle dataset build
prompt: Make me an econ dataset with all necessary econ datasets for a housing-cycle hypothesis.
description: A user asks for a research-ready housing-cycle dataset. The CLI should create a remote research environment with a concrete acquisition and validation plan instead of answering abstractly.

createResearchEnvironmentRun.prompt: Build a county-month housing-cycle research dataset.

arguments.name: Housing-cycle economics panel
arguments.description: County-month research panel for testing housing-cycle hypotheses.
arguments.sourceDescription: Public macro, housing, labor, credit, demographic, and sentiment sources needed for a housing-cycle hypothesis.
arguments.prompt: Fetch, stage, normalize, validate, and document a county-month housing-cycle research dataset. Include FRED macro indicators, Census/ACS population and income fields, Zillow/Redfin housing price and rent series, BLS labor and CPI series, FHFA HPI, and NBER recession indicators. Produce source URLs, row counts, missingness checks, join-key validation, temporal coverage, data dictionary, and a manifest. The output must be ready for a hypothesis test about housing-cycle dynamics.
